title: Anyone seen a person that looked similarto an Eva character
display_title: Anyone seen a person that looked similarto an Eva character
wikitext:
[]: Anyone seen a person that looked similarto an Eva character?             Quote Post by Leighton » Fri Feb 18, 2011 11:07 am It's inevitable is this huge world. What eva-like people have you evageeks seen? What are the stories?! And I'm yet to have come across anyone similar to any of the evangelion characters - I'm keeping my eyes peeled for the Asuka out there :) haha

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Feb 18, 2011 11:30 am

[]: Re: Anyone seen a person that looked similarto an Eva charac             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Feb 18, 2011 11:41 am Leighton wrote: I'm keeping my eyes peeled for the Asuka out there :) haha

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Fri Feb 18, 2011 11:43 am Anno kinda looks like Gendo.

[]: Re: Anyone seen a person that looked similarto an Eva charac             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Fri Feb 18, 2011 12:10 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Here's a trailer I edited for a TV producer . (It's the producer's official YouTube channel, so it should be okay.) It was for a dance competition TV pilot that I shot and edited for the producer, and one of the child dancers in the looked exactly like Asuka. I was working on the show before I ever saw Evangelion, so my reaction to Asuka was "OMG! I've seen you before!" Kinda Large Images  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Fri Feb 18, 2011 12:12 pm ^ Ritsuko, you sick bastard, SHE`S EVEN YOUNGER THAN Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Feb 18, 2011 12:13 pm How old was she again? I thought she was 10-12 or something like that

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Feb 18, 2011 12:15 pm Xard wrote: How old was she again? I thought she was 10-12 or something like that

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Feb 18, 2011 12:17 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: She was 9 in one of the videos, and 12 in another. They've been shooting different live shows since 2003, and I was only hired for the tail end of that production back in 2009.

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Fri Feb 18, 2011 12:51 pm Guys it's not even like that. I'm all for Ritsuko and nobody else .

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Fri Feb 18, 2011 12:54 pm Ritsuko wrote: Guys it's not even like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Fri Feb 18, 2011 1:02 pm Xard wrote: too late now your deceptions are transparent

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Feb 18, 2011 1:16 pm Whatever, Ritsuko. It was probably an honest mistake. I should have posted ages next to the pictures anyway. My bad, dude.

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Fri Feb 18, 2011 2:39 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Whatever, Ritsuko. It was probably an honest mistake. I should have posted ages next to the pictures anyway. My bad, dude.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Feb 18, 2011 4:21 pm Shiro said he looked like a non-asian Shinji. Whatever that means.

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Fri Feb 18, 2011 7:10 pm I mentioned this in another thread but there's this Chinese guy named Chang in my neighborhood that looks exactly like Kaji with a little more facial hair. There's also this nerdy kid in Physics class who looks a lot like what I imagine Hyuga would have looked when he was 17.

[]:             Quote Post by LivingFire » Thu Feb 24, 2011 6:20 pm Whenever my mom straightens her hair and has a lab coat on, she looks like an older version of Yui.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Thu Feb 24, 2011 6:23 pm there was a girl at my school who kind of looked like Rei, if she had blue hair rather than black hair the resemblance would be nearly complete.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Feb 24, 2011 6:59 pm My female duck looks like Pen-Pen when she gets pissed.

[]:             Quote Post by Leighton » Fri Feb 25, 2011 1:29 am KnightmareX13 wrote: there was a girl at my school who kind of looked like Rei, if she had blue hair rather than black hair the resemblance would be nearly complete.
summary:
[]: Anyone seen a person that looked similarto an Eva character?             Quote Post by Leighton » Fri Feb 18, 2011 11:07 am It's inevitable is this huge world. What eva-like people have you evageeks seen? What are the stories?! And I'm yet to have come across anyone similar to any of the evangelion characters - I'm keeping my eyes peeled for the Asuka out there :) haha

[]:         &nbs
